scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix shared && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix desktop
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix shared run build && npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.test: npm --prefix backend run test && npm --prefix frontend run test
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix shared run typecheck && npm --prefix backend run typecheck && npm --prefix frontend run typecheck
